description: Price Comparison + Marketplace Listing - Compare card prices before listing from collection

userStories.title: Add marketplace listing table to DB
userStories.description: Create the marketplace listing infrastructure with price comparison fields
acceptanceCriteria: Add Listing table with fields: id, item_id, seller_id, asking_price, status, market_avg_price, price_source, created_at
Add price comparison fields to CollectionItem: market_avg_price, last_price_check, price_source

userStories.title: Create mock price comparison service
userStories.description: Build a mock pricing engine that returns simulated market data for any card
acceptanceCriteria: Function getMarketComparison(cardName, cardSet, condition) returns: avg, min, max, trend
Deterministic pricing based on card name hash (same card = same price)

userStories.title: Add Sell button to collection cards
userStories.description: Add a 'Sell' action to each card in the collection dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Add Sell button to AssetCard component
Button only shows for authenticated card owners

userStories.title: Build Price Comparison Modal
userStories.description: Create modal showing user's card vs market prices with listing form
acceptanceCriteria: Modal shows card details (name, set, condition, user's purchase price)
Displays market comparison: avg, min, max, trend (up/down arrow)
Input field for custom asking price

userStories.title: Show active listings in Marketplace
userStories.description: Update Marketplace page to show real listings from DB
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch active listings from Listing table
Display card name, seller, asking price, condition

userStories.title: Add My Listings section to Profile
userStories.description: Show user's own marketplace listings in Profile page
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch listings where seller_id = current user
